[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11110010 5
1 00000000 a
2 00000000 a
3 00000000 a
4 00000000 a
5 10010010 3
6 01101011 5
7 00001010 2

01 10 00000010 1
12 21 00001010 2 match 7
23 32 00001000 1
34 43 10100000 2
45 54 00000100 1
56 65 00000000 a match 1 2 3 4
67 76 10000010 2
70 07 10010010 3 match 5

24 42 00000010 1
35 53 00000000 a match 1 2 3 4
46 64 10000010 2
57 75 00000000 a match 1 2 3 4

71 17 01100010 3

72 27 00000010 1

37 73 11110000 4
